title: EasyHarvest
description: A mod that gives more use to the hoe tool. Allows the harvesting of crops with a right click of the hoe. Depending on the material of the hoe, the area of effect will be larger
body:
# EasyHarvest Mod 
This mod adds a use to the hoe instead of it going to waste after setting up your farm. This mod allows users to right click with the hoe to automatically collect and replant your crops for an "EasyHarvest". For different materials of hoes, different patterns will be used.
**Note:** This does not work with Pumpkins and Melons yet.

![Hoe Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5cea84df031bac9b64e2c45ae52bf9260bcf41d.png)
### Wooden/Stone
  2x3 Rectangle

  ![Stone](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYzBnbmZvdHNieXdtNmpxOXJkam12dHNvZGlsbDlwZmlub2ZvdDFwNSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/ZHUcuuQW4KSln43ajH/giphy.gif)

### Iron/Golden/Copper
  3x3 Square

  ![Golden](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNXRlYjYya3dsZ3FhMjJqM2F1ODBmNmMwa3N6aGgwNXAzMTdoNDRlNyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/QjijuQmgKfKWfvYHek/giphy.gif)

### Diamond/Netherite
  5x5 Square
  
![Netherite](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcmF4bWw1ZXZpZjgzNThrdmZ4bXg1ajFkYWl5bG5jZjg3OGZ5aXhoMSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/0yeuZzaEAwjfnNQYXj/giphy.gif)

### Fortune
  Fortune does work with EasyHarvest. If a hoe has fortune 3, it will be applied to the drops when using easy harvest

## Seedler
This is a operator feature that allows the user to crouch and apply bonemeal to nearby crops. This can be configured via permissions as well as in the config file. You can set the diameter via config or command line, as well as enable and disable this feature.

![Seedler](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYXozbTQ2YmF3MnUyc2RyYWFwaWphb3ZqYXo1amwxZWxlNW8wYnRnYiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/nep5N4bAYKVhiY1iOe/giphy.gif)
